subcodes.first_line: O Kind God! We are sinners and Thou art the Forgiver; we are transgressors and Thou art the Pardoning, the All-Forgiving [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای خدای مهربان ما گنهکاریم و تو آمرزگار و ما تبه کاریم و تو عفو غفار هرچند
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for forgiveness, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @prayer for the spiritual progress of others
